title: oberna variegata
intro: Oberna variegata, also known as the variegated Oberna, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Africa. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. Consuming Oberna variegata has been associated with several health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving respiratory function, and exerting antioxidant effects. Oberna variegata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, but more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
